title: Chapter 1

BREAK Divine Horsemen Glissando SECOND SOLO Japanoiserie Jump Joint Break BREAK WITH FOUR SECTIONS THIRD SOLO Dissonant Swing Ascending Triplet ▢ THE SECOND MOVEMENT FOURTH SOLO Tamchu and the Girl DRIVING RHYTHM Tamchu Goes Traveling Mid-beat Phrase on the Tonic New World Strut Left-Hand Voicings BREAK Extended Riff in Past and Future Minor ▢ THE THIRD MOVEMENT ARGENTINIAN INTERLUDE Prelude to a Somewhat Distant Kiss West Coast Cutting Contest Two Intervals of Overwhelming Distance Kyoto Sandman ▢ THE FOURTH MOVEMENT MAJOR TONAL CHANGE Paris Stop Time Legal Jive; Briefly Transformative Syncopations Crescendo of Light Chromatic Passing Note Hard Bop Rip, Slow Spill ▢ THE FIFTH MOVEMENT The Ellington Effect; Trading Sixes Ride Out Final Note
